scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium shot of the model sitting inside a car, natural daylight coming through the window, using a tripod for a steady, intimate framing. The model looks directly into the camera while speaking, maintaining confident eye contact. The camera slowly zooms in as she talks, keeping a shallow depth of field with a soft blurred background to keep focus on her face. Midway, cut to a close-up shot of the model holding the Ottocast Play2Video Ultra in her right hand, fingers gently tapping the device as she continues speaking, with natural handheld camera motion to add realism. Insert an additional close-up shot of the car’s infotainment screen showing a clear interface with app icons such as YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, TVer, and standard CarPlay icons, well-lit and in sharp focus. Return to the medium shot with the product held near the model’s face, softly lit to highlight the device, as she finishes speaking with a relaxed smile while still looking at the camera.
scene_1.dialogue: 『私が車のエンタメ環境をアップグレードする前に知っておけばよかったことは、実は有線のCarPlayをOttocast Play2Video Ultraで簡単にマルチメディアセンターに変えられるってことです。以前は機能が限られていて苦労していました。』
